mapper.select: SELECT TS.SERVICE_ID, TS.CAR_NO, TS.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TO_CHAR(TS.REQUEST_DT, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS REQUEST_DT, TS.PROC_ST FROM TR_SERVICE TS, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE TS.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID AND TS.WORK_CD IN ('CARPRNT', 'CARPGRP') AND TS.REQUEST_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY TS.REQUEST_DT DESC
